title: carpinus kawakamii
intro: Carpinus kawakamii, also known as Kawakami's hornbeam, is a species of tree native to Taiwan, belonging to the family Betulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to treat various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues, while also being used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Carpinus kawakamii is often used in decoctions, infusions, or as a dried powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
